programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Somewhere Street- A Little Stroll
programs.desc: A 15-minute spin-off of the "Somewhere Street" series, "A Short Stroll" explores cities through a traveler's eyes.Today we visit Vancouver, a seaport Canadian city.

programs.title: Dining With The Chef
programs.desc: . Learn how to cook tempura at home. Chef Saito demonstrates the techniques needed to make crispy tempura using mountain vegetables of spring. Tatsuo Saito, Rika Yukimasa, Yu Hayami, Patrick Harlan.

programs.title: Time-lapse Journey
programs.desc: . The world comes alive in a different way after sunset, with bright city lights or the glow of a 24-hour industrial complex. See how the scenery changes through the night with time-lapse photography.
